case_title: VINCENT ULFIG VS. EDUARDO JOSE RAGOLTA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JOANNE MADDEN 506. PLAINTIFF VINCENT ULFIG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EDUARDO JOSE RAGOLTA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES THEIR RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ULFIG, VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT RAGOLTA, EDUARDO JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY ULFIG, VINCENT RAGOLTA, EDUARDO JOSE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ULFIG, VINCENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAGOLTA, EDUARDO JOSE $4,729.25 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,779.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RAGOLTA, EDUARDO JOSE
